# Carlos Ledesma — Personal Website

> Carlos Ledesma Castejón is a Tech Lead, Solution Architect, and Senior Software Engineer based in Madrid, Spain.
> He specialises in QA & AI Strategy, COBOL Modernisation, Full-Stack Development, and Applied Generative AI.

## About

- Name: Carlos Ledesma Castejón
- Location: Madrid, Spain
- Email: carlos.developer1983@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/carlosledesmac
- GitHub: https://github.com/munchkin09
- Website: https://carloslc.is-a.dev

## Professional Summary

Tech Lead and Software Architect with 13+ years of experience across the full SDLC, specialising in the intersection of Quality Engineering, Automation, and Generative AI. Led COBOL-to-modern-stack legacy modernisation and designed AI Agents applied to quality in large banking and technology corporations, with direct impact on teams across Europe and Latin America.

## Current Role

- **Company:** NTT DATA
- **Title:** Quality & AI Solutions Architect
- **Period:** Jun 2024 – Present
- **Highlights:** Autonomous AI agents for software quality, AI-assisted COBOL migration pipelines, automated test case generation with LLMs, technical training across Europe and LATAM.

## Key Skills

- AI / LLM: Agentic AI, GenAI applied to code, OpenAI, Claude, Test Case Generation, Langchain/Langraph, CrewAI, n8n, mcp´s, skills, agents, orchestration
- Languages: TypeScript/JavaScript (Expert), Python, Bash, PowerShell, PHP, VBasic, Java
- QA & Testing: Selenium, Cucumber, WebdriverIO, Cypress, Jest, Playwright, Karate, Mocha, JUnit
- Cloud & DevOps: Azure, GCP, AWS, Docker, Jenkins, GitLab CI, Github Actions
- Architecture: Microservices, System Design, Legacy Modernisation, Agile/Scrum

## Site Structure

- `/` — Portfolio homepage (hero, skills chart, blog)
- `/cv` — Full curriculum vitae
- `/blog/[id]` — Blog posts

## WebMCP Tools Available

This site exposes the following tools via WebMCP for AI agents:

- `get_profile` — Returns the owner's professional profile (name, title, contact, summary)
- `get_experience` — Returns the full work experience history
- `get_skills` — Returns the skills grouped by category
- `get_education` — Returns education history
- `navigate_to_section` — Scrolls to a named section on the homepage (hero, skills, blog)
- `navigate_to_page` — Navigates to a route (/cv, /blog)

## Optional

- [Full CV](/cv)
- [Blog](/blog)
